# Sohila Khaled Abbas — Portfolio

> Portfolio of a BI Developer & Data Analytics Engineer specializing in Power BI, SQL, Python, and scalable data architectures. Includes curated Notion roadmaps and a project inquiry form for data consulting engagements.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Full portfolio showcasing BI dashboards, data engineering projects, skills, certifications, community volunteering, and professional credibility metrics.
- [Templates](/templates): Curated Notion roadmaps and learning templates for Excel, SQL, Python Web Scraping, and Data Engineering.
- [Project Inquiry](/intake): Data & BI project intake form for clients seeking consulting or collaboration on data infrastructure and analytics.
